transactions.flagReason: Description 'Bad Address' is a bank-generated fee for returned mail — charged when statements or notices cannot be delivered due to an invalid address on file. Not a merchant purchase.

parserNotes: Found 2 transactions — both in savings-0000. Data sourced from online portal (current cycle, not yet closed). Balance as of 03/12: $7,473.52. This fee suggests the address on file may be outdated — worth updating at CitadelBanking.com or a branch. Checking account (0071) showed no activity this cycle as of 03/12, consistent with the prior two months. Cycle not yet closed — additional transactions may post before month end.
